data: {"generalSituation":"The northeast monsoon will continue to bring slightly cooler weather to the coast of Guangdong today. With the monsoon moderating, temperatures will rise progressively over the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. A trough of low pressure is expected to form over central China tomorrow and edge closer to the coast of southern China on Friday. Meanwhile, upper-air disturbances will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. A fresh to strong northeast monsoon will affect the coast of Guangdong during the weekend to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260506","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"East force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy. Slightly cooler with one or two rain patches in the morning.
